# RKLB Investor Dashboard — robots.txt
# Placeholder domain — replace with your real domain before publishing.
# https://rklbdashboard.example/

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Don't crawl the auto-generated quote JSON or workflow internals
Disallow: /data/
Disallow: /.github/

# Be friendly to LLM crawlers / answer engines too
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://rklbdashboard.example/sitemap.xml
